## LoadConfigOptions.configPath property

The config file path to load.

**Signature:**

```typescript
configPath?: string | undefined;
```

## Default Value

Automatically resolves `lynx.config.ts`<!-- -->, `lynx.config.js`<!-- -->, `lynx.config.mts`<!-- -->, or `lynx.config.mjs` from `cwd`
